common.requestFailed: Request failed. Please try again later.

apiErrors.aiBadResponse: AI returned an invalid format. Please try again.
apiErrors.cancelStatusInvalid: This job cannot be cancelled from its current status: {{detail}}
apiErrors.cancelUnsupported: This provider does not support video task cancellation
apiErrors.cancelVideoOnly: Only video generation jobs can be cancelled
apiErrors.cannotGrantSelf: You cannot grant permission to yourself
apiErrors.capabilityOrFeatureRequired: Capability or feature query parameter is required
apiErrors.conflict: The request conflicts with the current state
apiErrors.customCapabilitiesRequired: Custom capabilities are required, such as text or image
apiErrors.deleteRunningJob: Running jobs must be cancelled before deletion
apiErrors.directorOrOwnerRequired: Director or owner permission is required
apiErrors.invalidCanvasType: Canvas type must be inspiration or workflow
apiErrors.invalidCloudConfigType: Config type must be S3, OSS, or TOS
apiErrors.invalidPermission: Permission must be read or write
apiErrors.modelListingUnsupported: This provider does not support model listing
apiErrors.noAIProviderConfigured: No AI provider is available. Add and enable a provider in AI configuration first.
apiErrors.nodeSelfDependency: A node cannot depend on itself
apiErrors.paymentConfigMissing: No payment method is available. Please contact an admin.
apiErrors.paymentProviderInvalid: The selected payment method is not available for this product
apiErrors.orderAccessDenied: You do not have access to this order
apiErrors.orderStateInvalid: This order state does not support that action
apiErrors.runningJobRetry: Running jobs cannot be retried until they fail or time out
apiErrors.sceneAlreadyLinked: This scene is already linked to the production
apiErrors.workflowCanvasRequired: Only workflow canvases can create run records
apiErrors.workflowRunRequired: Workflow canvases must be run as a workflow
apiErrors.writePermissionRequired: Write permission is required to upload to this folder

auth.emailCodeRequired: Enter your email and verification code first
auth.registrationClosedHint: Registration is closed. Contact an administrator to create an account.
auth.bootstrapRequiredHint: This service does not have an administrator yet. The first account you create will become the super admin.

onboarding.title: Choose How to Use Movscript
onboarding.description: Choose where your data and services run. You can change the connection later in App Settings.

local.title: Use Locally
local.description: Keep data on this computer. Best for personal projects and your own model API keys.

cloud.title: Cloud Service
cloud.description: Connect to Movscript Cloud or a team service for sync, collaboration, and cloud capabilities.

localIdentity.title: Your Local Identity
localIdentity.description: This is not a cloud account. It only identifies this local workspace.
localIdentity.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters.

cloudConnect.title: Connect to Cloud
cloudConnect.description: Use Movscript Cloud or your team service URL.

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.description: Configure how this client starts and which service it connects to. This is stored locally and can be changed before sign-in.
appSettings.launchModeHint: Local launch requests system admin initialization during registration. Cloud launch only connects to the remote service.
appSettings.cloudModeHelp: Connect to Movscript Cloud or a team service without creating a system admin during registration.
appSettings.localModeHelp: Connect to a local backend and initialize one system admin during registration.
appSettings.cloudApiHint: Login, assets, projects, and agent requests will use this service.
appSettings.apiBaseURLHelp: Cloud or external services can use http://localhost:8765 or https://api.example.com. Frontend-managed local mode uses http://localhost:8766.
appSettings.invalidURL: Enter a URL that starts with http:// or https://.
appSettings.adminConsoleHelp: In local mode, use the admin console to add provider credentials, enable models, configure feature routing, and debug generation jobs.

backendBoot.startingDescription: Preparing the frontend-managed backend, SQLite database, and local file storage.
backendBoot.errorDescription: Check the backend logs and try switching modes from App Settings.

forms.name: Name
forms.title: Title
forms.selectResourceFile: Select image / video / audio / text file
forms.assetStatePlaceholder: Select or enter the matching asset state
forms.createEpisodeBeforeEpisodeScript: Create a production entity before creating its production script.

details.generateHint: Enter an AI prompt to start generating
details.uploadShotHint: Upload a finished shot video here.
details.noAssetViews: No view images yet. Upload them from the asset page.
details.intentPlaceholder: Emotion, information, or narrative function this storyboard should communicate
details.characterFreeformPlaceholder: Add motives, secrets, arcs, catchphrases, performance notes, or anything that does not fit fixed fields...
details.noCharacterGraph: Add characters to show the graph.
details.coreSettingsPlaceholder: One core rule, relationship, or constraint per item...
details.backgroundPlaceholder: Describe the period in one short sentence...
details.scenesPlaceholder: One detailed scene per item: space, time, mood, visible elements, and blocking...
details.episodeHookPlaceholder: Core hook or highlight of this production...
details.plotSummaryPlaceholder: Briefly describe this production's plot direction...
details.sceneHookPlaceholder: Core purpose or content of this scene...
details.noPointTags: No tags yet. Add tags to points in the sidebar first.
details.noScriptPoints: No points yet. Enter body text, then generate points.

projectHome.noDescription: No project description yet. This dashboard summarizes script, asset, production, and delivery status.

now.title: Current Push
now.subtitle: The next entry is recommended from project data.

sections.pipelineHint: A five-stage overview from production management to delivery.
sections.focusHint: Prioritize gaps that block downstream production.

script.title: Production Management
script.description: Import, analyze, and calibrate scripts for later asset and shot breakdown.

references.title: Creative References
references.description: Collect characters, world rules, style references, and creative constraints.

assets.title: Asset Prep
assets.description: Confirm production references for characters, locations, props, audio, and brand assets.

production.title: Production
production.description: Own one complete production from script, preview, references, assets, content, to final video.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: Collect approved shots for final assembly and delivery checks.

library.title: Asset Library Overview
library.subtitle: Review the project's saved assets, creative reference links, and previewable media. Use asset generation for asset slots, candidate generation, and locking.
library.emptyHint: Uploaded assets will appear here as the project asset overview.

semantic.title: Asset Generation
semantic.subtitle: Track the reference images, videos, audio, and brand assets still needed for production.
semantic.searchPlaceholder: Search gaps, segments, or asset cues...
semantic.emptyAssetSlotsHint: Adjust filters or generate new asset gaps from production management.

sections.candidatesHint: Candidates can come from uploads, generation tools, or the existing asset library. Production uses only locked assets.
sections.productionReadinessHint: This checks adoption state; a completed task is not treated as an adopted asset.
sections.lockedAssetHint: Production views will prefer this adopted asset.

semantic.noCandidatesHint: Upload a reference, run a generation tool, or pick a candidate from the asset library.
semantic.noLockedAssetHint: Lock a candidate so the production page has a stable reference.

resources.enableSharingHint: Enable sharing before granting other users access to this folder.
resources.clipLoadSourceFailed: Failed to load the source video. Try again later.
resources.clipSourceMissing: The source video is still loading.
resources.clipSourceEmpty: The source video file is empty and cannot be clipped.
resources.clipSourceTooLarge: The source video is too large ({{size}}). Local clipping currently supports up to {{max}}.
resources.clipDesktopOnly: Local video clipping is only available in the desktop app.
resources.clipFFmpegMissing: ffmpeg was not found. Install ffmpeg or bundle it under vendor/ffmpeg.
resources.clipTooLong: The selected segment is too long. Keep clips under 10 minutes.
resources.clipTimeout: Local clipping timed out. Shorten the segment, use a smaller source video, or try again later.
resources.clipOutputNameMp4: Clip output currently supports MP4 file names only.
resources.clipOutputNameInvalid: File names cannot include paths, control characters, or reserved symbols.
resources.clipOutputNameTooLong: File names must be 80 characters or fewer.
resources.clipLocalHint: Clipping runs locally in the desktop frontend, then uploads a new video to the resource library.
resources.clipBusyHint: Processing the clip. Wait for local clipping and upload to finish.
resources.clipCreated: Video clip added to the resource library
resources.clipFallbackApplied: {{name}}. Fast mode could not copy the segment directly, so accurate mode was used automatically.

collaboration.workNotesPlaceholder: Record your progress, blockers, or completion notes...

preview.title: Production Management Status
preview.readySummary: Production management is confirmed and can move on to task assignment and review.
preview.pendingSummary: This project has a production management draft, but it is not ready for production yet.
preview.missingSummary: There is no usable production management draft yet. Confirm one in Production Management first.
preview.notReadyTitle: Not in a production-ready state yet
preview.noDraft: The latest saved draft will appear here after Production Management is used.

canvases.subtitle: Inspiration · Workflow

typeDescriptions.inspiration: Run nodes manually and explore ideas freely.
typeDescriptions.workflow: Define inputs and outputs for end-to-end automation.

canvases.workflowCreateHint: New canvases are created as workflows with default input and output nodes.

projects.emptyHint: Create your first short drama project to start managing scripts, productions, and assets.

localAdminPrompt.title: Configure local AI models first
localAdminPrompt.description: You are using a local workspace. Before generating images, videos, or using the agent, add provider credentials and enable models in the admin console.

jobs.emptyHint: Submit a generation task from the tools page.

shots.noVideo: This shot has no generated video

agents.description: Manage your personal AI assistants with platform templates or full customization.
agents.empty: No agents yet. Click "New Agent" to start.
agents.emptyTemplateHint: Or choose a platform template when starting a new chat.
agents.soulPlaceholder: Define the agent's role, behavior, and constraints...

debug.title: Agent Debug Console
debug.description: Observe local Agent Runtime status, current context, Prompt Preview, recent runs, and raw diagnostics. Manage persistent configuration in Agent Settings.

scope.noPersistentWrites: Does not modify models, Skills, Profiles, or tool policy
scope.runDiagnosticsInDetails: Per-run diagnostics live in conversation details

debug.defaultPreviewMessage: Check the next best step for the current project.

modelCredentials.notRequired: Not required for this call mode

observationDetails.runtimeReady: Runtime health, catalog, and capabilities are loaded.
observationDetails.runtimeMissing: Runtime is not connected; status cannot be observed.
observationDetails.modelConfigReady: Runtime model config is saved for {{model}} and credentials are ready.
observationDetails.modelConfigUnavailable: Runtime is not connected, so model config cannot be observed.
observationDetails.modelConfigReadFailed: Runtime is online, but model config could not be read: {{reason}}.
observationDetails.modelConfigMissing: No Runtime model config is saved. Open Agent Settings to configure the default model.
observationDetails.modelCredentialMissing: Runtime model config is saved, but direct provider credentials are missing: {{env}}.
observationDetails.mcpReady: MCP is connected, so resources and tool capabilities can be observed.
observationDetails.mcpMissing: MCP is disconnected or resources are unavailable.
observationDetails.contextMissing: No project selected; only global Runtime can be observed.
observationDetails.previewReady: Preview is generated; prompt, context, and plan can be inspected.
observationDetails.previewMissing: Preview has not been run yet.

evidenceChecklistDetails.runtimeReady: Runtime health, catalog, capabilities, and run list are included.
evidenceChecklistDetails.runtimeMissing: Runtime is unavailable; this bundle cannot prove current Runtime state.
evidenceChecklistDetails.observations: {{total}} observation checks completed; {{actions}} unavailable and {{warnings}} missing, across {{warningSources}} warning sources.
evidenceChecklistDetails.triage: {{total}} triage items generated, including {{actions}} action items.
evidenceChecklistDetails.runs: {{total}} recent runs are included; {{issues}} grouped run issues need review.
evidenceChecklistDetails.previewMissing: Run Preview for prompt, context, and plan evidence before escalation.
evidenceChecklistDetails.redactionReady: Bundle copy/download paths redact secret-like values before export.

remediationDetails.failedRuns: {{count}} failed runs found. The representative reason is: {{reason}}.
remediationDetails.requiresAction: {{count}} runs are waiting for confirmation. The representative reason is: {{reason}}.
remediationDetails.modelConfig: Debug only observes the problem; Agent Settings owns the persistent model, credential, and route fix.
remediationDetails.preview: Run Preview builds prompt, context, plan, and approval evidence without changing saved settings.
remediationDetails.mcp: MCP state is read-only here. Use the grouped signals to decide whether Runtime or connector setup needs attention.
remediationDetails.warningSignals: {{count}} warnings across {{sources}} sources are present. Review the grouped warnings before changing configuration.

redactionNotice.title: Debug Bundle is redacted
redactionNotice.detail: Copied or downloaded Bundles redact keys, tokens, cookies, and signed URL parameters; full per-run diagnostics still live in conversation details.

triageDetails.failedRuns: Representative reason: {{reason}}. Open run details to inspect steps, tool calls, and error context.
triageDetails.requiresAction: Representative reason: {{reason}}. Per-run handling still lives in conversation details.
triageDetails.warningSignals: From {{sources}} sources. Debug only aggregates signals; use Agent Settings for persistent configuration fixes.

observation.runtime: Runtime connection is required to read health, catalog, capabilities, and run records.
observation.model-config: Runtime model config is missing or lacks direct provider credentials. Use Agent Settings to fix persistent model configuration.
observation.mcp: MCP is disconnected or resources are unavailable, so tool/resource observation is incomplete.
observation.context: Without a selected project, Debug can only observe global Runtime state.
observation.preview: Run Preview before inspecting this prompt, context, and plan.
observation.runs: No run records are available, so runtime trends cannot be judged yet.
observation.warnings: Warning signals exist; inspect the grouped warning sources.

bundleFields.schema: Stable machine-readable identifier for this Debug Bundle.
bundleFields.schemaVersion: Debug Bundle structure version for automated parsing and compatibility checks.
bundleFields.schemaUrl: Public location of the Debug Bundle schema for issue-report validation.
bundleFields.triageItems: Prioritized read-only triage results for deciding what to inspect next.
bundleFields.remediationPlan: Read-only next-step routing that points to Settings, run details, Preview, or observation-only review.
bundleFields.observationCoverage: Which observation signals this diagnostic bundle covers, and whether each one is missing.
bundleFields.evidenceChecklist: Support-readiness checklist explaining whether the bundle has enough redacted evidence for escalation.
bundleFields.runIssueGroups: Run issue counts and representative reasons grouped by status.
bundleFields.warningGroups: Runtime, catalog, and Preview warnings grouped by source.
bundleFields.redacted: Marks that this Debug Bundle has redacted keys, tokens, cookies, and signed URL parameters.
bundleFields.preview: The latest Preview prompt, context, plan, and approval data, redacted on export.
bundleFields.runtime: Runtime health, catalog, capabilities, and recent run snapshot, redacted on export.
bundleFields.modelConfig: The effective Runtime model config, routes, and credential status, redacted on export.
bundleFields.modelConfigError: A redacted error explaining why Runtime model config could not be read.

empty.runPreviewHint: Run a preview to inspect prompt, context, plan, and approvals.
empty.runPromptPreviewHint: Run a preview to inspect compiled prompt parts.
empty.runContextPreviewHint: Run a preview to inspect runtime context.
empty.runPlanPreviewHint: Run a preview to inspect plan, tool calls, and approvals.
empty.noApprovals: No approval required in this preview.
empty.noTriageItems: No issues need triage right now.
empty.noRemediationItems: No remediation steps are suggested right now.
empty.modelConfigReadFailed: Model config could not be read: {{reason}}

settings.title: Agent Settings
settings.description: Manage persistent local Agent Runtime configuration, including model calls, Skills, Profiles, tool policy, run presets, and settings snapshots.

scope.controlPlane: Control plane: configures future default runs
scope.debugReadOnly: Use Agent Debug for Runtime observation

settings.modelHelp: When Base URL is empty or points to the MovScript backend, select an enabled backend text model and save it to the local Agent Runtime model-config.
settings.providerModelIdHelp: For direct OpenAI or Anthropic modes, enter the provider model ID directly. It does not need a matching backend model catalog entry.
settings.providerModelPanelHelp: Enter the model ID. When Base URL is empty or points to the MovScript backend, the backend login credential is used; only external provider URLs need an API key here.
settings.modelRequired: Select a model or enter a provider model ID first.
settings.modelIdSecretsBlocked: The provider model ID looks like it contains an API key, Bearer token, or URL with secret parameters. Enter only the model ID and put the secret in the API key field.
settings.providerApiKeyConfiguredPlaceholder: API key saved; leave blank to keep using it
settings.providerCredentialNotice: External providers need an API key
settings.providerCredentialHelp: Only required when Base URL points to an external provider. Do not put keys in the Base URL.
settings.baseUrlHelp: Leave empty to use the MovScript backend /v1 compatible endpoint. Only external provider URLs need an API key.
settings.baseUrlSecretsBlocked: The Base URL contains username/password credentials or sensitive fields such as token, api_key, or signature. Remove URL secrets and store model credentials in the API key field instead.

apiKindDescriptions.backendChatCompletions: Calls through the MovScript backend model gateway, reusing backend credentials, routing, and audit controls.
apiKindDescriptions.openaiResponses: Calls OpenAI Responses API directly for newer agentic, multi-turn, and tool-using workflows.
apiKindDescriptions.openaiChatCompletions: Calls OpenAI Chat Completions API directly for compatibility with the older message format.
apiKindDescriptions.anthropicMessages: Calls Anthropic Messages API directly for Anthropic models.

settings.apiModeCapabilityHelp: This controls which model interface future runs use. Debug only shows the effective result and does not modify call mode.

centralizedCredentials.label: Centralized credentials
centralizedCredentials.detail: Uses backend model gateway credentials and does not require a local Runtime direct key.

backendRouting.label: Backend routing
backendRouting.detail: Reuses backend model catalog, toggles, and route policy for team governance.

backendAudit.label: Backend audit
backendAudit.detail: Model calls still pass through backend audit paths for investigation and cost attribution.

chatCompatibility.label: Chat compatibility
chatCompatibility.detail: Keeps the Chat Completions shape for existing gateway behavior.

agenticPrimitive.label: Agentic primitive
agenticPrimitive.detail: Responses is the default preferred mode for new Agent workflows with tools and multi-turn tasks.

structuredOutputs.label: Structured outputs
structuredOutputs.detail: Supports clearer structured output and tool-call contracts.

responseState.label: Response state
responseState.detail: Fits future stateful long tasks and continuous reasoning better.

builtInTools.label: Built-in tool expansion
builtInTools.detail: Can later connect provider-side built-in tools instead of only local functions.

legacyCompatibility.label: Legacy compatibility
legacyCompatibility.detail: Keeps the message/choice format for migration periods or older models.

functionCalling.label: Function calling
functionCalling.detail: Supports traditional function calling, while new capabilities should converge on Responses.

simpleMessageShape.label: Simple message shape
simpleMessageShape.detail: Request bodies stay close to older chat APIs and existing code.

migrationPath.label: Migration path
migrationPath.detail: Keep it as a compatibility option; move new Agent capabilities to Responses over time.

anthropicNative.label: Anthropic native
anthropicNative.detail: Uses Anthropic Messages API directly for the Claude model family.

toolUse.label: Tool use
toolUse.detail: Preserves Anthropic tool-use semantics and normalizes them into local Agent trace.

directCredential.label: Direct credential
directCredential.detail: Requires a direct provider key in the API key field.

separateModelFamily.label: Separate model family
separateModelFamily.detail: Useful for evaluation and routing outside OpenAI model families.

settings.modelCompatibilityHelp: Local checks for provider fit before Save and Test. They do not write configuration or call the model.

modelCompatibilityDetails.apiModeReady: {{apiKind}} is compatible with the selected provider path.
modelCompatibilityDetails.apiModeChatCompatibility: Chat Completions is a compatibility mode; prefer Responses for new OpenAI Agent work.
modelCompatibilityDetails.modelIdMissing: Select or enter a model ID before saving.
modelCompatibilityDetails.modelIdSecret: The model ID contains secret-looking text; keep credentials in the API key field.
modelCompatibilityDetails.modelIdBackendReference: Direct provider modes need provider model IDs, not backend model_config references.
modelCompatibilityDetails.modelIdProviderMismatch: {{model}} looks like it belongs to another provider family.
modelCompatibilityDetails.credentialsBackendManaged: Backend gateway credentials are managed outside local Runtime direct provider settings.
modelCompatibilityDetails.credentialsMissing: API key settings have not saved {{env}} for this provider.
modelCompatibilityDetails.credentialsReady: API key settings report {{env}} is configured for this provider.
modelCompatibilityDetails.credentialsUnchecked: Credential status is verified after saving this provider mode and running Test.
modelCompatibilityDetails.baseURLDefault: The MovScript backend /v1 compatible endpoint will be used.
modelCompatibilityDetails.baseURLSecret: Base URL contains secret-looking query or credential data.
modelCompatibilityDetails.baseURLInvalid: Base URL must be a valid http(s) URL.
modelCompatibilityDetails.routesReady: At least one model route is enabled for future runs.
modelCompatibilityDetails.routesMissing: Enable chat or planning route before saving.

openai_responses.detail: Responses is already selected, which is the recommended path for new Agent capabilities.

openai_chat_completions.detail: Chat Completions is compatibility mode. Use it for older flows, then migrate new Agent work to Responses.

anthropic_messages.detail: Anthropic Messages is a provider-native path, not an OpenAI migration step. Keep it separate for Claude-family evaluation.

apiModeMigrationSteps.centralize: Keep team credentials, routing, and audit centralized in the backend gateway.
apiModeMigrationSteps.evaluate: Evaluate whether the workflow needs provider-native response state or built-in tools.
apiModeMigrationSteps.switchWhenReady: Switch selected flows to Responses once direct provider credentials and model ids are ready.
apiModeMigrationSteps.recommended: Use Responses as the default for new OpenAI Agent workflows.
apiModeMigrationSteps.stateful: Prefer Responses when future runs need response state or longer reasoning continuity.
apiModeMigrationSteps.futureTools: Leave room for provider-side built-in tools without changing the settings boundary.
apiModeMigrationSteps.preserveCompatibility: Keep Chat Completions only for older message/choice integrations during migration.
apiModeMigrationSteps.verifyModel: Confirm the direct provider model id and Base URL are valid for the Responses API.
apiModeMigrationSteps.switchResponses: Switch the draft call mode to Responses, save, then run the connectivity test.
apiModeMigrationSteps.providerNative: Use Anthropic Messages when evaluating Claude-family provider-native behavior.
apiModeMigrationSteps.compare: Compare behavior against OpenAI modes through run outputs and read-only Debug observations.
apiModeMigrationSteps.keepSeparate: Do not mix Anthropic provider settings into the OpenAI migration path.

settings.apiModeSwitchPlanHelp: Review the concrete blockers before saving. {{actions}} actions and {{warnings}} review items are currently visible.

apiModeSwitchPlanDetails.targetModeStable: {{apiKind}} is already the recommended target for this provider path.
apiModeSwitchPlanDetails.targetModeMigration: {{apiKind}} should migrate toward {{targetApiKind}} for new Agent work.
apiModeSwitchPlanDetails.probeMissing: Compatibility probe data is not available yet.
apiModeSwitchPlanDetails.saveTestBlocked: Resolve action items before saving and running the model connectivity test.
apiModeSwitchPlanDetails.saveTestPending: Draft changes are ready for Save and Test after review.
apiModeSwitchPlanDetails.saveTestReady: Saved configuration is ready for the model connectivity test.

settings.noTextModels: No text models are available. Enable a text model in model management first.
settings.useForChatHelp: Use this model for regular AI Assistant conversations.
settings.useForPlannerHelp: Use this model for multi-step plans and task decomposition.

modelRouteIssues.allRoutesDisabled: Enable at least one of Use for chat or Use for planning; otherwise the Agent has no available model route.

settings.testMessageDefault: Reply in one sentence: the Agent Runtime model connection is working.
settings.runPresetsHelp: Regular Agent chat uses this preset's tool-call limit, iteration limit, and frontend planning preferences by default. Page-level explicit run policies still take priority.
settings.runPresetNewDescription: Custom defaults for future Agent runs.
settings.installSkillBundleHelp: Paste JSON with pluginId and files. The Agent catalog reloads automatically after install.
settings.skillBundleFileLoaded: Loaded {{fileName}}. Review the content before installing.
settings.uninstallSkillBundleHelp: Only deletes files owned by this pluginId under the Agent Skills plugin directory. The Agent catalog reloads automatically after uninstall.
settings.uninstallSkillBundleMissing: {{pluginId}} does not have an installed plugin directory.
settings.uninstallSkillBundlePluginIdInvalid: pluginId may only contain letters, numbers, dot, underscore, or hyphen.
settings.skillPolicyEditHelp: Manage default skill enabled state here. Core skills are locked by the system.
settings.skillPolicyCoreLocked: Core skills are loaded by the system and cannot be disabled here.
settings.skillPolicyToggleHelp: Affects skill activation candidates for future default Agent runs.
settings.skillPolicyIssues: Skill policy has dependency or conflict issues
settings.skillGovernanceHelp: Review version coverage, source, and trust posture before changing default Skill policy.
settings.defaultProfileHelp: After saving, future default Agent runs use this Profile's skills, tool grants, and policies.
settings.profileSwitchResetsToolPolicy: Changing the default Profile uses the new Profile's tool grants and clears current tool policy overrides. Save the Profile first, then tighten permissions in Tool Permission Policy if needed.
settings.toolPolicyEditHelp: Only tighten permissions for the current default Profile here. Add tool grants by changing the Profile or capability pack.
settings.toolPolicySearchPlaceholder: Search tools by name, source, risk, or reason
settings.toolPolicyBulkHelp: Applies to the currently filtered tool policy rows only. Review the diff before saving.
settings.toolPolicyFilterPresetsHelp: Save recurring tool reviews such as write-risk or blocked tools.
settings.toolPolicyAllowDisabled: Only tools granted by the current Profile and available in Runtime can be saved as allowed.
settings.toolPolicyDraftIssues: Tool policy draft has unsavable items
settings.toolPolicyDraftInvalid: Tool policy draft has {{count}} unsavable items.

toolPolicyDraftIssueDetails.notProfileGranted: Not granted by the current Profile.
toolPolicyDraftIssueDetails.unavailableAllow: Currently unavailable ({{reason}}), so it cannot be saved as allowed.

sectionDescriptions.model: Choose call mode, model, and usage routes.
sectionDescriptions.runPresets: Save common run limits and planning preferences.
sectionDescriptions.skills: Install, reload, and manage default Skill policy.
sectionDescriptions.profiles: Select default work mode and preview switch impact.
sectionDescriptions.tools: Tighten tool permissions for the current Profile.
sectionDescriptions.snapshot: Migrate, back up, or restore Agent settings.

settings.settingsAuditHelp: Records Settings page configuration actions only, not per-run diagnostics.

auditSummaries.toolPolicySaved: Saved tool permission policy: {{count}} rules (allow {{allow}} / deny {{deny}} / approval {{approvals}})
auditSummaries.quickFixApplied: Applied local quick fix: {{quickFix}} ({{target}}, persists only after saving)
auditSummaries.quickFixAppliedImmediate: Applied quick fix: {{quickFix}} ({{target}}, local defaults updated)

settings.actionItemsEmpty: No configuration action items need attention.

quickFixes.switchedToResponses: Local draft switched to OpenAI Responses. Save before future default runs use it.
quickFixes.downgradedAutoPermission: Current run preset approval mode changed to Suggest. Save before future default runs use it.
quickFixes.applied: Local fix applied. Review and save any configuration that should persist.

actionItems.modelIdSensitive: Saved model ID may contain secrets
actionItems.apiModeCompatibility: Call mode is still compatibility mode
actionItems.modelCredentialsMissing: Direct model credentials are not loaded
actionItems.modelBaseURLSensitive: Model Base URL may contain secrets
actionItems.toolPolicyInvalid: Tool policy draft cannot be saved
actionItems.autoPermissionWriteRisk: Auto approval mode has high-risk tools

actionItemDetails.modelMissing: Choose a model, call mode, and usage routes, then save.
actionItemDetails.modelUnsaved: Save or reset the current model config; future default runs still use the old config until then.
actionItemDetails.modelIdSensitive: The saved direct Provider model ID looks like it contains an API key, Bearer token, or URL with secret parameters. Clear this config and save only the model ID; credentials belong in the API key field.
actionItemDetails.apiModeCompatibility: Chat Completions is available for older flows; unless this is a migration period, switch new Agent workflows to OpenAI Responses.
actionItemDetails.modelCredentialsMissing: API key settings did not detect {{env}}; direct provider calls will fail.
actionItemDetails.modelBaseURLSensitive: The Base URL contains username/password credentials or sensitive fields such as token, api_key, or signature. Put model credentials in the Agent Runtime environment instead.
actionItemDetails.routesInvalid: Enable at least one usage route for chat or planning.
actionItemDetails.routesMissing: Check model config and usage toggles so future runs have an available model.
actionItemDetails.profileMissing: Select and save a default work mode.
actionItemDetails.profileUnsaved: Save the Profile before future default runs use the new work mode.
actionItemDetails.skillPolicyInvalid: There are {{count}} dependency or conflict issues. Fix them before saving Skill policy.
actionItemDetails.skillPolicyUnsaved: Save Skill policy before future default runs use the new Skill enabled state.
actionItemDetails.toolPolicyInvalid: Tool policy draft has {{count}} unsavable items. Fix them before saving tool policy.
actionItemDetails.toolPolicyUnsaved: Save tool policy before future default runs use the new tightened permissions.
actionItemDetails.autoPermissionWriteRisk: The current run preset auto-approves execution while {{count}} available tools can write, generate, change UI, or perform destructive actions. Switch to Suggest or tighten tool policy.
actionItemDetails.toolsBlocked: {{count}} tools were discovered, but none are available under the current policy.

actionItemPersistHints.saveOrReset: This is a Settings draft: save to affect future default runs, or reset to discard local changes.
actionItemPersistHints.saveAfterQuickFix: Quick fix only changes the local draft; save before it affects future default runs.
actionItemPersistHints.localDefaultsImmediately: Quick fix updates local default settings immediately for future runs.
actionItemPersistHints.useRuntimeEnvForSecrets: Do not store secrets in URLs; switch to the API key field before saving.

actionItemReasons.toolNotProfileGranted: {{toolName}} is not granted by the current Profile
actionItemReasons.toolUnavailableAllow: {{toolName}} is currently unavailable ({{reason}}), so it cannot be saved as allowed

readinessDetails.modelMissing: Runtime model config has not been saved.
readinessDetails.modelIdSensitive: The saved model ID looks like it contains secrets; settings snapshot export will skip this model config.
readinessDetails.apiModeResponsesRecommended: OpenAI Responses is the recommended path for new Agent capabilities.
readinessDetails.apiModeChatCompatibility: Current mode is Chat Completions compatibility; useful during migration, but new Agent capabilities should prefer Responses.
readinessDetails.apiModeBackendManaged: Current calls are managed through the backend gateway for team credentials, routing, and audit.
readinessDetails.apiModeAnthropicProvider: Current calls use Anthropic Messages directly for Claude-family models and provider-native evaluation.
readinessDetails.modelCredentialsReady: API key settings loaded model credentials from {{env}}.
readinessDetails.modelCredentialsMissing: API key settings did not detect {{env}}.
readinessDetails.modelCredentialsNotRequired: This call mode does not require a direct model key in Runtime.
readinessDetails.routesInvalid: Model route config is invalid; fix usage toggles first.
readinessDetails.runPresetAutoWriteRisk: {{name}} uses Auto approval while {{count}} available tools can write, generate, change UI, or perform destructive actions.
readinessDetails.skillsInvalid: Skill policy has {{count}} dependency or conflict issues.
readinessDetails.skillsMissing: No Skills are available in the catalog.
readinessDetails.toolsInvalid: Tool policy draft has {{count}} unsavable items.

settings.settingsSnapshotHelp: Export includes model call config, default Profile, Skill policy, Tool Permission Policy, and Run Presets, and strips secret URL credentials from Base URLs. Import applies only the selected sections, in model, profile, skills, tools, then run presets order, and rejects Base URLs that contain secret URL credentials.
settings.settingsSnapshotPlaceholder: Generate or paste Agent Settings Snapshot JSON here.

settingsSnapshotImpactDetails.model: Import saves model {{model}} and affects future Agent calls.
settingsSnapshotImpactDetails.modelSkipped: The snapshot has no model config; the current Runtime model is unchanged.
settingsSnapshotImpactDetails.profileSkipped: The snapshot has no default Profile; the current work mode is unchanged.
settingsSnapshotImpactDetails.skillsSkipped: The snapshot has no Skill policy; current Skill state is unchanged.
settingsSnapshotImpactDetails.toolsSkipped: The snapshot has no tool policy; current tool permissions are unchanged.
settingsSnapshotImpactDetails.runPresets: Import updates {{count}} run presets and selects {{activeRunPresetId}}.
settingsSnapshotImpactDetails.runPresetsSkipped: The snapshot has no run presets or active preset; local run presets are unchanged.

settings.settingsSnapshotImportScopesHelp: Only selected sections are checked during dry-run and written during import.
settings.settingsSnapshotImportPresetsHelp: Presets only change selected sections; dry-run and Import still control writes.

settingsSnapshotImportScopeDetails.model: Runtime model routing and provider API mode.
settingsSnapshotImportScopeDetails.profile: Default Profile used by future runs.
settingsSnapshotImportScopeDetails.run-presets: Local run presets and the active run preset.

settings.settingsSnapshotFileLoaded: Loaded {{fileName}}. Review the content before importing.
settings.settingsImportBackupHelp: Current settings were automatically backed up at {{time}} before the latest import. Loading the backup still shows a preview first; click Import again to roll back.
settings.settingsBackupLoaded: Pre-import backup loaded. Review the preview before importing.
settings.settingsSnapshotModelCatalogUnavailable: The snapshot references a backend model config, but the current model catalog is not available.
settings.settingsSnapshotCatalogUnavailable: The snapshot references Profiles, Skills, or tool policy, but the current catalog is not available.
settings.settingsSnapshotCapabilitiesUnavailable: The snapshot references tool policy, but the current Runtime capabilities catalog is not available.
settings.settingsSnapshotToolPolicyInvalid: Snapshot tool policy has {{count}} items that cannot be imported.
settings.settingsSnapshotImportScopeEmpty: Select at least one available section to import.
settings.settingsSnapshotDryRunReady: Dry-run passed. {{count}} impact items are ready to import; no settings were written.
settings.settingsImportDoneWithBackup: Settings snapshot imported and pre-import backup retained.
settings.modelRoutesEmpty: No model route metadata is available.

modelRouteSources.disabled: A model is configured, but this usage is disabled by scope.
modelRouteSources.unconfigured: No model is configured for this usage.

chat.uploadAttachment: Upload image, video, audio, or text
chat.projectRequiredHint: The Agent uses the current project info for drafts and tool actions.

suggestions.planProject: Plan the next step for this project
suggestions.createContentUnit: Create a content-unit plan from asset slots
suggestions.buildWorkflow: Break this into an executable workflow

chat.browserModeManualStart: Browser mode can still start it manually with

approvalImpact.label: Impact
approvalImpact.generationCreate: Approving will submit a paid or quota-consuming image/video generation job and may create a new output resource.
approvalImpact.generationCancel: Approving will stop the running generation job; unfinished output may be lost.
approvalImpact.generationGeneric: Approving will let the agent act on generation jobs or generated media in this project.
approvalImpact.projectCreate: Approving will create a formal project record visible in MovScript.
approvalImpact.projectWrite: Approving will let the agent write project data, such as creating or updating records.
approvalImpact.scriptCreate: Approving will save the script as a formal project script record.
approvalImpact.draftWrite: Approving will let the agent update local draft data used for review.
approvalImpact.memoryWrite: Approving will change local agent memory and may affect future suggestions.
approvalImpact.memoryDelete: Approving will delete the selected local agent memory.
approvalImpact.catalogReload: Approving will reload local skills, tools, packs, and profiles from disk.
approvalImpact.subagentSpawn: Approving will start worker agent runs for scoped plan tasks.
approvalImpact.subagentCancel: Approving will cancel the selected worker agent run.
approvalImpact.destructive: Approving may remove or cancel existing data. Review the details before continuing.
approvalImpact.write: Approving will allow a write action instead of only reading or previewing data.
approvalImpact.default: Approving will let the agent call this tool and continue the run with its result.

workflow.needsInput:
Additional information is required before execution:
{{items}}
workflow.noAssistantMessage: The local Agent runtime did not return an assistant message.

work.emptyKindHint: No {{entity}} yet. Create one on the right.
work.emptyWorkspace: Select a {{entity}} from the list above

flow.title: Input / Output
flow.description: Define workflow entry, exit, and approval gates.

media.title: Media
media.description: Hold text, image, video, and audio assets.

ai.title: AI Processing
ai.description: Transform upstream input into generated results.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Organize complex canvases with regions and semantic groups.

plugins.title: Local Plugins
plugins.description: Place plugins installed in this client as local cards on the canvas.

input.label: User Input
input.description: Collect text input when running a workflow.

output.label: Workflow Output
output.description: Expose an upstream value as a typed output of this workflow.

resource_sink.label: Save Resource
resource_sink.description: Persist an upstream value to the resource library.

entity_card.label: Entity
entity_card.description: Reference a project entity and use its fields as workflow inputs or outputs.

approval.label: Manual Approval
approval.description: Pause the workflow at key steps for review.

text.label: Text
text.description: Write, upload, or receive AI text.

image.label: Image
image.description: Image resource or generated image result.

ai_gen.label: AI Generation
ai_gen.description: Generate image, video, text, or audio by target type.

text_gen.label: AI Text Generation
text_gen.description: Expand, summarize, or rewrite from upstream content.

ref_image_gen.label: Reference Image
ref_image_gen.description: Generate a new visual direction from reference images.

multi_angle.label: Multi-angle Image
multi_angle.description: Generate multi-angle views from a character or object image.

style_transfer.label: Style Transfer
style_transfer.description: Transfer a reference style to target media.

motion_imitation.label: Motion Imitation
motion_imitation.description: Make the target character imitate reference motion.

canvas.label: Canvas Reference
canvas.description: Reuse intermediate results from another canvas.

group.label: Group
group.description: Select and organize a group of nodes.

pluginCard.noPlugins: No plugins are installed in this client
pluginCard.localRuntimeDescription: This card runs in the current client and writes results back to node state.
pluginCard.missingPlugin: This plugin is not available in the current client. Reinstall or enable it first.

resourceShelf.title: Available Content
resourceShelf.dragHint: Drag onto the canvas to create nodes
resourceShelf.noProject: This canvas is not linked to a project

history.title: Run History
history.description: Runtime snapshots let you review inputs, results, and the canvas structure from each run.

audit.title: Entity Write Audit
audit.description: Entity field changes written by canvas runs.

errors.nodeNotFound: Node not found in the database

editor.nodeLibraryHint: Drag nodes onto the canvas, or click to add them to the viewport center
editor.emptyTitle: Drag input, AI processing, and output nodes from the left
editor.emptyDescription: You can also right-click the canvas to insert nodes. Select a node to configure its model, prompt, and media source on the right.

status.dragging: Moving node. Release to keep its position.
status.idle: Drag to pan the canvas. Box-select for batch actions.

editor.noSelectionDescription: Select a node to edit its label, input source, model, prompt, and run settings here.
editor.workflowInputDescription: Fill each input using its parameter type, then the workflow will run automatically.
editor.nodeRuntimeInputDescription: Provide values for unconnected input ports before running this node.

referenceWorkflow.selectWorkflow: Select a referenced workflow to show its interface
referenceWorkflow.latestOutputHint: Runtime reads the latest successful output from this workflow. Input ports express upstream dependencies.
referenceWorkflow.noWorkflowHint: Choose a workflow canvas in the inspector to generate handles from its input/output nodes.

nodePanel.promptPlaceholder: Describe what you want to generate... Type @ to reference upstream nodes
nodePanel.inputDefaultPlaceholder: Workflow runs will prompt for this, or you can set a default here...
nodePanel.inputHint: This node is the workflow entry. The run dialog will ask for this content.
nodePanel.outputHint: This node only defines a workflow output for callers. Use a Save Resource node when the value should be written to the resource library.
nodePanel.resourceSinkHint: This node writes the upstream value to the resource library. Resource inputs are reused; text, JSON, number, and boolean values are saved as files.
nodePanel.approvalHint: The workflow pauses at this node and waits for manual approval before continuing.
nodePanel.referenceWorkflowHint: Only workflow canvases can be referenced. Runtime reads the latest successful output resource.
nodePanel.label: Label
nodePanel.fileNamePlaceholder: Leave blank to generate a random name

canvas.pushHint: Add this {{type}} to the following entity assets
canvas.noPushTargets: No push targets yet. Select an asset, storyboard, or scene above first.

genInput.addResourcesFirst: Add resources to the tags first

promptPlaceholder.image: Describe what you want to generate... Type @ to reference images from the resource library
promptPlaceholder.video: Describe what you want to generate... Type @ to reference videos from the resource library
promptPlaceholder.image+video: Describe what you want to generate... Type @ to reference images or videos from the resource library

genInput.selectOrUploadHint: Select from the resource library on the left, or upload below

generation.promptPlaceholder: Describe what you want to generate...

resourcePanel.previewDragTitle: Click to preview, drag to add

page.selectFromLeft: Or select from the resource or asset library on the left

page.videoUnsupportedWarning: The current model does not support video references. Video "{{name}}" will be ignored.

brainstorm.description: Chat freely with AI to spark creative ideas. Each submission is an independent request.
brainstorm.promptPlaceholder: Enter your idea... Type @ to reference images from the resource library, Cmd+Enter to send
brainstorm.inputHint: Cmd+Enter to send · Type @ to reference images
brainstorm.emptyHint: Enter an idea to start brainstorming
brainstorm.requestFailed: Request failed. Check the model configuration and try again.

refImageGen.name: Reference Image
refImageGen.description: Generate a new image from a reference image.

refVideoGen.name: Reference Video
refVideoGen.description: Generate a new video from reference video.
refVideoGen.promptPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to generate... Type @ to reference images or videos from the resource library

motionImitation.name: Motion Imitation
motionImitation.description: Transfer motion from a reference video to the target character and generate a new motion video.
motionImitation.promptPlaceholder: (Optional) Describe the target character's appearance. AI will transfer the reference video's motion to that character... Type @ to reference images or videos from the resource library

multiAngle.name: Multi-angle
multiAngle.description: Generate multiple angle views of a character or object from a single image.
multiAngle.promptPlaceholder: Describe the angles or viewpoints you want to generate... Type @ to reference images from the resource library

videoEdit.name: Video Edit
videoEdit.description: Generate an edited video from a source video and edit instructions.
videoEdit.promptPlaceholder: Describe the edit target, such as trimming, pacing, shot reordering, or style processing... Type @ to reference videos from the resource library

styleTransfer.name: Style Transfer
styleTransfer.description: Transfer the reference image's art style onto the content image and generate a new stylized image.
styleTransfer.promptPlaceholder: Describe the target content. AI will redraw it using the reference image's style... Type @ to reference images from the resource library

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Plugin install, execution, and deletion stay in this client (IndexedDB)
plugins.insertDescription: Paste a client plugin manifest JSON. Saving writes only to this client's IndexedDB.
plugins.selectHint: Select a plugin on the left or install one first
plugins.installFromUrlDescription: Enter the URL of a plugin manifest (JSON) or bundle (JS). It will be downloaded and installed locally.
plugins.author: Author
plugins.marketplaceEmptyHint: Install custom plugins from a file or URL
plugins.emptyHint: Install custom plugins from a file / URL, or wait for the marketplace

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: AI model configuration, user credits, and usage analytics

openai_compat.name: OpenAI-compatible API
openai_compat.description: Text and image models compatible with the OpenAI API, including OpenAI, DeepSeek, and Doubao.

kling.name: Kling
kling.description: Kuaishou video and image generation models using Access Key and Secret Key authentication.

volcen.name: Volcengine Ark
volcen.description: ByteDance Ark platform for Doubao text, Seedream image generation, and Seedance video generation.

gemini.name: Google Gemini
gemini.description: Google AI models for Gemini text chat, Imagen image generation, and Veo video generation.

params.title: Generation Parameters
params.empty: No generation parameters configured. After adding them, users will see matching selects, number inputs, or toggles in the generation panel.
params.inheritSummary: Inherit default parameters for the current adapter and capabilities: {{params}}
params.noneSummary: This model explicitly rejects all configurable generation parameters.

models.title: AI API Configuration
models.description: Manage credentials, enable models, and configure credit pricing.
models.useAdapterDefaultUrl: Leave blank to use the adapter default URL
models.providersHint: Manage provider credentials, model capabilities, and pricing here. Models with the same priority are distributed in round-robin order.
models.gatewayHint: This view covers gateway routing policy. Multiple keys at the same priority are rotated across available candidates.
models.gatewayRuleBody: Models at the same priority are no longer picked randomly. They are distributed in round-robin order so multiple keys can share traffic more evenly.
models.gatewayPriorityBody: Higher-priority models are still preferred. Only candidates at the same priority enter the rotation pool.
models.gatewayScopeBody: Gateway keys can be constrained by project, model, and scope. Rotation only affects same-priority candidate selection.
models.gatewayKeyBody: This view keeps provider setup. Gateway key creation, enablement, and limits are managed in the gateway area.
models.presetHint: Selecting one fills all fields automatically. You can still edit them.
models.modelIdLabel: Model ID (identifier sent to the API)
models.displayNamePlaceholder: Optional. Leave blank to use Model ID.
models.noModelsHint: No models added yet. Click "Add Model" to start.
models.noCredentialsHint: No credential configured yet. Click "Add Credential" in the top right to connect one.

credentials.filesAPIHint: (Upload images to provider /files and pass file_id to the model to avoid oversized multipart requests.)
credentials.filesAPIBaseURL: Files API Base URL (leave blank to use the Base URL above)
credentials.filesAPIKey: Files API Key (leave blank to use the API Key above)
credentials.filesAPIKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to reuse the main credential API Key
credentials.enableFilesAPIDetail: Enable Files API pre-upload (upload images to provider /files and use file_id instead of multipart)
credentials.filesAPIBaseURLCredential: Base URL (leave blank to use credential Base URL)
credentials.leaveBlankUseCredentialBaseURL: Leave blank to use credential Base URL
credentials.filesAPIKeyCredential: API Key (leave blank to use the credential primary Key)
credentials.leaveBlankUseMainKey: Leave blank to use the primary credential Key
credentials.volcenRelayHintTitle: Configure a public relay for Seedance video generation
credentials.volcenRelayHintBody: Volcen Ark's Seedance video API only accepts public URLs — base64 is rejected for video inputs. Configure a TOS bucket so the worker can auto-upload local reference images and videos.

users.title: User Management
users.description: View user balances and recharge Credits for users.

projects.title: Project Management
projects.description: View all projects and force assign a new owner when the current owner is missing or incorrect.
projects.name: Project
projects.changeOwnerHint: Saving updates the project owner_id and project member table. Other owner members in the same project are demoted to director.

features.title: Feature Configuration
features.description: Assign available models for each tool feature. When unrestricted, all enabled models of that type are available.
features.unrestrictedModelsHint: (unrestricted, use all available models of this type)
features.leaveBlankUseModelId: Leave blank to use model ID
features.modelIdOverridePlaceholder: e.g. ep-xxx or a specific model ID

script_analyze.name: Script AI Analysis
script_analyze.description: Analyze script content and extract key information such as characters, background, and scenes.

assistant_chat.name: Assistant Chat
assistant_chat.description: Sidebar assistant for project creation support.

canvas_text.name: Canvas Text Generation
canvas_text.description: Text generation node in canvas workflows.

canvas_image.name: Canvas Image Generation
canvas_image.description: Image generation node in canvas workflows.

canvas_video.name: Canvas Video Generation
canvas_video.description: Video generation node in canvas workflows.

shot_ref_image.name: Shot Reference Image Generation
shot_ref_image.description: Generate reference images from storyboard descriptions.

shot_ref_video.name: Shot Reference Video Generation
shot_ref_video.description: Generate reference videos from reference images or descriptions.

ref_image_gen.name: Reference Image
ref_image_gen.description: Generate a new image from reference images, with text-to-image also supported.

ref_video_gen.name: Reference Video
ref_video_gen.description: Generate video from reference images or descriptions.

motion_imitation.name: Motion Imitation
motion_imitation.description: Transfer motion from a reference video to target characters.

video_edit.name: Video Edit
video_edit.description: Generate an edited video from a source video and edit instructions.

style_transfer.name: Style Transfer
style_transfer.description: Transfer the reference image's art style to the target image.

multi_angle.name: Multi-angle
multi_angle.description: Generate multi-angle views from a single reference image.

brainstorm.name: Brainstorm
brainstorm.description: Multi-turn AI chat for creative exploration and script ideation.

storage.internalStorageDescription: Stores user uploads, canvas intermediate assets, and model outputs. These URLs only need to be readable by the MovScript backend and are not provider input URLs.
storage.modelInputRelayDescription: When local assets need to be sent to OpenAI, Volcen, Kling, and other providers, workers use provider Files API or public object relay configuration.

cloudFiles.publicObjectRelayDescription: S3, OSS, and TOS buckets must be publicly reachable by providers for image-to-video and video reference inputs that only accept URLs.
cloudFiles.providerFilesAPIDescription: Provider-owned file spaces such as OpenAI and Volcen are enabled under credentials in Model Management. Models receive file_id values.
cloudFiles.internalMinioDescription: Only persists MovScript resources. Workers no longer send MinIO private presigned URLs to external providers.
cloudFiles.title: Public Object Relay Configuration
cloudFiles.description: After configuring S3, OSS, or TOS, workers upload input assets by priority and pass public URLs to provider APIs that only accept URLs.

rawCall.title: Raw API Call
rawCall.description: Send an HTTP request from the backend and return full request headers, request body, and response details.

jobs.title: Job Monitor
jobs.description: Page through generation job states and complete HTTP exchange records. {{total}} total.
jobs.noProviderCalls: No provider HTTP calls were captured. Check the state machine and error details above.

connectivity.title: Model Connectivity Test
connectivity.description: Send real API requests for each configured model to verify credentials and network connectivity.
connectivity.costWarning: Image model debugging calls generation APIs and may incur a small cost.

sandbox.title: Provider Sandbox
sandbox.description: Enter credentials and parameters directly to debug any provider API. Credentials are not stored and are only used for this request.
sandbox.endpointHint: (capability is inferred from the URL path)
sandbox.endpointAfterModel: Shown after entering a model ID

toast.enableDebugMode: Enable debug mode (show details on errors)

org.codeManagementHint: Members can enter this code to join the current workspace.

invite.title: Join Workspace
invite.subtitleLoggedIn: You are logged in. Click below to join {{org}}
